page_metadata.biotools__summary: Suite of programs for computational structure-based protein design. It is specifically designed to identify protein mutants that possess desired target properties (e.g., improved stability, switch of substrate specificity, etc.).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Suite of programs for computational structure-based protein design. It is specifically designed to identify protein mutants that possess desired target properties (e.g., improved stability, switch of substrate specificity, etc.).
